title: Fly FisFis
description: A unique temporary fly plugin all of you need
body:
**About the Plugin**


FisFisFly is a lightweight and performance-friendly plugin that gives your players timed or unlimited flight access. Unlike other flight plugins, FisFisFly is smart: it only consumes flight time when a player is actually flying! This makes flight a valuable resource and a fun mechanic for your server's gameplay.



**Key Features** ✨


**Smart Time Consumption:** ⏰ Flight time only decreases while actively flying. Time is paused when players are on the ground or swimming.

**Advanced Management:** ⚙️ Use admin commands to easily manage, give, take, or set flight time for your players.

**Infinite Flight Option:** ♾️ Grant certain players unlimited flight time with a simple permission node.

**PlaceholderAPI Support:** Display remaining flight time in a fully customizable format using a placeholder. **%fisfisfly_time%**

**Lightweight & Secure:** ✅ No performance issues and seamless integration with other plugins.

**Full Customization:** All messages and prefixes can be easily customized in external files.
Commands & Permissions:⌨️

**fisfisfly.allow:**
- **/fly**
- Toggles your flight mode on or off, using your available flight time.
- default op

**fisfisfly.time:**
- **/flytime**
- Allows players to check their own flight time.
- default true

**fisfisfly.inf:**
- Grants the player infinite flight time.
- default op

**fisfisfly.admin:**
- **/ffly give <player> <amount> <unit>**
- **/ffly take <player> <amount> <unit>**
- **/ffly set <player> <amount> <unit>**
- **/ffly check <player>**
- default op

✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **FisFisFly** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!

- **BuildByBit:** https://builtbybit.com/creators/fisfiskoray.600970
- **PolyMart:** https://polymart.org/user/57522/fisfiskoray
- **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/user/FisFisKoray
